mapper.sql: id, session_id, student_id, entry_type, category_id, category_name, feedback_mode, status, current_index, total_count, started_at, last_active_at, completed_at, expired_at, abandoned_at, created_at, updated_at, version
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO practice_session ( session_id, student_id, entry_type, category_id, category_name, feedback_mode, status, current_index, total_count, started_at, last_active_at, completed_at, expired_at, abandoned_at, version ) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, #{studentId}, #{entryType}, #{categoryId}, #{categoryName}, #{feedbackMode}, #{status}, #{currentIndex}, #{totalCount}, #{startedAt}, #{lastActiveAt}, #{completedAt}, #{expiredAt}, #{abandonedAt}, #{version} )
mapper.update: UPDATE practice_session SET status = #{status}, last_active_at = #{lastActiveAt}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, expired_at = #{expiredAt}, abandoned_at = #{abandonedAt}, version = version + 1 WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND version = #{version}
